recording_instructions.tone: Maintain consistency: keep your tone, pitch, volume, and emotion steady. Speak naturally, as if reading an audiobook.
recording_instructions.pace: Do not speak too fast. Pause slightly at commas and periods for natural breathing space.
recording_instructions.format: One sentence per file. Record one complete sentence, then stop and save.
recording_instructions.quality: Avoid mouth noises. If you stumble on a sentence, discard the take and record it again from the start.

sentences.text: The morning light filtered through the curtains, casting long shadows across the wooden floor.
She carefully placed the glass on the edge of the table, hoping it would not fall.
Every single day, I walk the same path through the park and notice something new.
The technician adjusted the settings, checked the display, and restarted the machine.
By the time we arrived, the sun had already dipped below the horizon.
He opened the letter slowly, his hands trembling with quiet anticipation.
The instructions were clear: mix the ingredients gently, then let the dough rest for an hour.
The bridge had stood for over two hundred years, weathering storms that no one alive could remember.
Mix three tablespoons of olive oil with a pinch of salt and a squeeze of lemon.
Despite the rain, they decided to continue the journey without stopping to rest.
The algorithm processes thousands of data points every second to generate a single prediction.
I have always believed that small, consistent effort leads to extraordinary results over time.
Looking back now, I understand why those difficult moments shaped who I became.
There are questions in life that do not have simple answers, and that is perfectly fine.
The old photograph reminded me of summers spent by the river, chasing fireflies at dusk.
Sometimes, the most important thing you can do is simply stop and listen.
I sat by the window for hours, letting my thoughts drift like clouds across an open sky.
She laughed, paused, then looked at him with an expression he could not quite read.
After everything that has happened, I still choose to believe in the goodness of people.
Welcome home. I have been waiting all day to tell you this good news.
You did an incredible job today, and you should be really proud of yourself.
Let me make you a cup of tea while you tell me everything about your day.
It means so much to me that you are here right now, truly.
Your kindness has made a difference in more ways than you will ever know.
We are going to figure this out together, one step at a time.
This is completely unacceptable, and I want it resolved before the end of the day.
I need you to focus. There is too much at stake to make careless mistakes now.
The data clearly shows a decline, and we cannot afford to ignore it any longer.
Stand firm. Do not let anyone convince you to compromise on what you know is right.
I have reviewed your proposal, and frankly, it needs significant rework before we proceed.
Have you ever wondered why the sky turns so many shades of orange at sunset?
What exactly happens inside a thunderstorm that makes the lightning crack so loudly?
I keep asking myself: is there a better way to solve this, or are we missing something obvious?
Do you think the choices we make as children still shape the adults we become?
That is fascinating — I had never considered that perspective before. Tell me more.
